$comment: Versioned provider pricing (ADR-0006 D40). USD per million tokens. Price changes bump `version` and update `pricedAt`; never rewrite history semantics — estimates record the version that produced them. Cache write rate is the 5-minute-TTL rate (1.25x input). Unknown models get NO estimate rather than a guess.

mock-instructor.notes: deterministic mock provider; zero cost, kept here so mock runs exercise the full cost pipeline
